summary: Add Restaurant365-specific schema discovery, redacted sampling, backfill planning, delete tombstone checks, bounded export, and OData pagination behavior.
reason: The generated endpoint wrappers could fetch documented views, but data engineers need safe tenant validation and explicit refresh planning before loading Restaurant365 OData into a warehouse.
validated_outcome: go test ./..., go build ./cmd/restaurant365-odata-pp-cli, and redacted live Restaurant365 OData validation passed.
